evals.prompt: I want to add offline mode to the Valt iOS app. Users should be able to view their portfolio data even without internet, and it should sync back when they reconnect. I haven't thought through how to do this yet — can we plan it out properly before I start coding?
evals.expected_output: Should trigger spec-kit, start at Specify phase, ask targeted questions about offline requirements, create .specify/features/ directory

evals.prompt: I've been going back and forth on the scanner redesign for the polymarket bot. I keep changing my mind on the architecture. Can you help me break this down into a proper spec so I stop spinning my wheels?
evals.expected_output: Should trigger spec-kit, recognize user is stuck, guide through Specify then Plan phases
Should invoke skill directly with notification-system as feature name, create directory, ask which phase to start from

evals.prompt: ok so I need to build a new dashboard widget that shows real-time P&L for open positions. it needs to pull from multiple exchanges and handle websocket disconnects gracefully. before we dive in lets actually think this through
evals.expected_output: Should trigger spec-kit even though user didn't say 'spec' — they want to plan before coding

evals.prompt: what should we build for the onboarding flow? I have some ideas but nothing concrete yet. I want new users to connect their exchange API keys, set risk parameters, and see a tutorial. Let's spec it out
evals.expected_output: Should trigger spec-kit, start at Specify phase, help crystallize vague ideas into structured requirements

evals.prompt: I need to hand this feature off to a contractor next week — can you help me write up a proper implementation plan they can follow without needing to ask me a million questions?
evals.expected_output: Should trigger spec-kit, recognize handoff context, focus on Plan and Tasks phases for clear documentation

evals.prompt: there's a bug in the scanner — it's not detecting zone breakouts when volume is below the threshold. can you fix it?
evals.expected_output: Should NOT trigger spec-kit — this is a bug fix, not feature planning

evals.prompt: rename the getUserPortfolio function to fetchPortfolioData across the codebase
evals.expected_output: Should NOT trigger spec-kit — this is a simple refactor

evals.prompt: write me a PRD for the mobile app redesign
evals.expected_output: Should trigger /prd skill instead of spec-kit — PRD is a different format
